title: Retenzy.pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform for Shopify e-commerce brands, founded in 2023 and headquartered in Pune, India.
* The software bundles customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to increase customer lifetime value (LTV).
* Loyalty programs include points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* Integrated review management automates the collection of text, photo, and video reviews via scheduled emails or SMS.
* Review features include automatic synchronization with Google Shopping and the generation of SEO-rich snippets.
* Businesses can construct custom referral networks to turn existing customers into brand advocates.

* Integration with Google Shopping and generation of SEO-rich snippets.  
* Creation of custom referral networks and membership tiers with exclusive perks like early access, free shipping, or special discounts.  
* Built-in marketing automation email flows, including welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.  
* Over 15 pre-built Retenzy storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without custom development.
